html:
Exclusive to:

Lune Tree Blossoms are Items exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are obtained by chopping Lune Trees. Additionally, they can be found naturally on the ground in Lunar Forest.

Lune Tree Blossoms can be eaten to restore 1 and are required to craft the Bath Bomb.

Contents

  • 1 Dried Lune Tree Blossom
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Dried Lune Tree Blossom

Dried Lune Tree Blossom are made from drying Lune Tree Blossom on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Lune Tree Blossom Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Usage

×10

Only during Hallowed Nights event

×8 / 6 / 4

Trivia

  • Lune Tree Blossoms were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

Gallery

  • Dried variant concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“It fell from the moon tree.”
–Wilson
“This would look even prettier if it was on fire.”
–Willow
“It come from weird tree.”
–Wolfgang
“Delicate and impermanent.”
–Wendy
“UNIMPRESSED”
–WX-78
“What a peculiar specimen.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's an awfully pretty blossom.”
–Woodie
“It came from that odd tree.”
–Maxwell
“Tis möst beauteöus in the möönlight.”
–Wigfrid
“We like this flower!”
–Webber
“How lovely!”
–Warly
“Lost?”
–Wormwood
“The trees sure are pretty 'round here.”
–Winona
“Look how it gleams in the moonlight!”
–Wortox
“Glargh, tree was full of flowers.”
–Wurt
“Who knew there were flowers on the moon?”
–Walter
“It's gone completely white.”
–Wanda

'''Lune Tree Blossoms''' are [[Items]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They are obtained by chopping [[Lune Tree]]s. Additionally, they can be found naturally on the ground in [[Lunar Forest]].

Lune Tree Blossoms can be eaten to restore 1 {{hp}} and are required to craft the [[Bath Bomb]].
